title: Deliciously Spicy Egyptian Eggplant Skillet
description: A funky and molten Egyptian dish featuring tomato sauce and miso-marinated eggplant, perfect for a brunch mood, this ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is a must try. It combines the flavors of Egypt with a spicy kick.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook until it is tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and tomato sauce.
Pour the miso-tomato sauce over the eggplant and onions.
Add the red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Create 4 wells in the eggplant mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Cover the skillet and cook until the eggs are cooked to your desired doneness.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro.
